bikes.blurb: Trek's entry Bosch commuter and one of the most common premium e-hybrids on the road. Huge parc means steady takeoff flow: Purion displays, 4A chargers, and stock Bontrager contact points come off constantly.

stock_parts.comp_note: New Purion 200 selling at $171 with 29 sold on eBay; classic Purion new listings $60-135. Could not confirm 3+ used solds, so estimated low at $60 for a used classic takeoff.

upgrade.name: Bosch Kiox BUI330 display
upgrade.note: Color screen and ride data the Purion never had. Plugs into the same BDU2xx and BDU3xx systems.

stock_parts.comp_note: eBay BPC3410 4A listing at $54-66 with 156 sold, second listing with 17 sold, variant range $50-135. Steady replacement demand from owners who lose or fry them.
New PowerPack 400 retails $675-799; eBay shows used and as-is units but no confirmed sold prices surfaced. Estimated low at $250 for a healthy used pack. Lithium pack, ground shipping only.

upgrade.name: Bosch PowerPack 500
upgrade.note: Same mount, 25 percent more range. The standard fix for range complaints on this bike.

stock_parts.comp_note: Stock foam saddles trade cheap and slow on eBay. No sold datapoints found, priced at the floor of the used saddle market.

upgrade.name: Brooks B17
upgrade.note: The classic commuter saddle. Breaks in to your backside and outlasts the bike.

stock_parts.comp_note: Used OEM e-bike tires move slowly and cheap. No solds found; priced low per tire assuming healthy tread.

upgrade.name: Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5x2.0
upgrade.note: Verified $63-74 street. The flat-proof commuter default; buy once, forget tires exist.

stock_parts.comp_note: No real resale market for stock plastic platforms. Bundle filler at best.

upgrade.name: Shimano PD-EH500
upgrade.note: Flat on one side, SPD on the other. The commuter pedal that ends the pedal debate.

stock_parts.comp_note: Basic spring posts trade around $15-25 used. No confirmed solds; estimated low.

upgrade.name: Cane Creek Thudbuster ST G4
upgrade.note: Parallel linkage instead of a pogo spring. Night and day on chewed-up pavement.

bikes.motor: Bosch Performance Line 65Nm mid-drive (Gen 2: Performance Line CX 85Nm)
bikes.blurb: Trek's serious commuter with the integrated PowerTube and full rack, fender, and light kit. Owners upgrade contact points fast and part-outs feed a real PowerTube and Purion takeoff market.

stock_parts.comp_note: Same shared Bosch part as other Purion bikes. New units $60-171 on eBay; used takeoff estimated low at $60 with no 3+ confirmed used solds.

upgrade.name: Bosch Kiox BUI330 display
upgrade.note: The common Purion swap on BDU3xx Allants. Color screen plus real ride metrics.

stock_parts.comp_note: EMTB forum pair asking 300 GBP each, eBay listings clustered $350-500, but no confirmed sold prices found. Estimated at the floor. Lithium pack, ground shipping only, health unknown until tested.

upgrade.name: Bosch PowerTube 625
upgrade.note: Drops into most PowerTube 500 frames for a 25 percent range bump. Confirm frame fitment first.

stock_parts.comp_note: Shared Bosch part: eBay 4A listings with 156 and 17 units sold, $50-135 range across variants.
Comes off when riders fit rigid or better forks. Thin used market, no solds found, estimated low at $60.
Name-brand e-rated tire so takeoffs do sell, but no confirmed solds found. Estimated low per tire with good tread.

upgrade.name: Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5x2.0
upgrade.note: Trades the Moto-X cushion for near total flat protection. Commuters make this swap at first flat.

stock_parts.comp_note: Stock saddle, cheap and slow on the used market. No solds found, floor pricing.

upgrade.name: Brooks B17
upgrade.note: Leather that molds to you over 500 miles. The upgrade every commuter forum recommends.

stock_parts.comp_note: MIK-compatible racks have real replacement demand from crash and part-out buyers, but no confirmed solds found. Estimated low.
No real resale market for stock platforms.

upgrade.name: Shimano PD-EH500
upgrade.note: Dual-sided commuter pedal. Grippy flat for errands, SPD for the long haul.

bikes.blurb: Class 3 flagship commuter with the quiet Brose-based 2.0 motor and a big 710Wh pack. Proprietary electronics mean Specialized takeoffs command replacement-part money from stranded owners.

stock_parts.comp_note: New TCD-W 2 retails about $260; eBay shows TCU and MasterMind listings but no confirmed used sold prices surfaced. Estimated low at $120. Strong replacement demand since nothing else fits.
New U2-710 sells for $783 at LordGun. No used solds found in searches. Estimated low at $400 for a healthy pack. Lithium, ground shipping only, proprietary so demand is captive.
Proprietary Rosenberger-plug charger, real lost-charger replacement demand. No confirmed solds found, estimated low at $60.
Specialized saddles carry brand value used but no solds confirmed. Estimated low.

upgrade.name: Brooks C17 Cambium
upgrade.note: Rubber Brooks, zero break-in, shrugs off rain. Right saddle for an all-weather Vado.

stock_parts.comp_note: Reflective-wall 650b OEM tire, sells but slowly. No solds found, low estimate per tire.

upgrade.name: Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5x2.0
upgrade.note: Verified $63-74 street. Heavier, slower, and you will never fix a flat in the rain again.

stock_parts.comp_note: Model-specific rack with replacement demand from crash repairs. No solds found, estimated low.
Used grips are near worthless unless mint. Floor pricing.

upgrade.name: Ergon GP1 Evo grips
upgrade.note: Wing-shaped support that kills hand numbness on long commutes. Cheapest comfort upgrade there is.

stock_parts.comp_note: No meaningful resale market for stock platforms.

upgrade.name: Shimano PD-EH500
upgrade.note: Flat plus SPD in one pedal. Standard first upgrade on a 28 mph commuter.

bikes.blurb: Upright comfort cruiser on the same MasterMind platform as the Vado. Comfort buyers swap saddles and grips immediately, and the 530 to 710 battery upgrade is a known path.

stock_parts.comp_note: Same shared part as the Vado 4.0 entry. New TCD-W 2 about $260, no confirmed used solds, estimated low at $120.
No direct used solds found. Scaled down from the U2-710 estimate ($400) by capacity. Lithium, ground shipping only.

upgrade.name: Specialized U2-710 battery
upgrade.note: Same mount on Gen 2 frames, 34 percent more range. The takeoff 530 funds part of it.

stock_parts.comp_note: Shared proprietary charger with the Vado. No confirmed solds, estimated low at $60.
Wide comfort saddle, sells used but slow. No solds confirmed, low estimate.

upgrade.name: Brooks B67
upgrade.note: Sprung leather made for upright bikes. Exactly what a Como rider actually wants.

stock_parts.comp_note: OEM 650b reflective tire. No solds found, estimated low per tire.

upgrade.name: Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5x2.0
upgrade.note: Flat protection worth every gram on a bike this heavy.

stock_parts.comp_note: Integrated rack with crash-replacement demand. No solds found, estimated low.
Same shared part as the Vado entry. Floor pricing.

upgrade.name: Ergon GP1 Evo grips
upgrade.note: Palm support for upright riding position. Cheap fix for numb hands.

bikes.blurb: Dutch belt-drive commuter with the Enviolo stepless hub and Bosch Performance Line. Near zero drivetrain takeoffs since the belt lasts forever, but the Bosch electronics and quality contact points move.

stock_parts.comp_note: Intuvias are plentiful used and trade below Purion money. No 3+ confirmed solds in searches, estimated low at $50.

upgrade.name: Bosch Kiox BUI330 display
upgrade.note: Color screen on the same BDU3xx plug. Common swap for riders who want real data.

stock_parts.comp_note: Shared Bosch part. Forum asks at 300 GBP, eBay listings $350-500, no confirmed solds. Floor estimate. Ground shipping only.

upgrade.name: Bosch PowerTube 625
upgrade.note: Range bump for the same slot in most frames. Verify fitment by frame year.

stock_parts.comp_note: Shared Bosch part: eBay listings with 156 and 17 units sold, $50-135 across variants.
Decent OEM saddle with some brand recognition. No solds confirmed, estimated low.

upgrade.name: Brooks B17
upgrade.note: The Dutch bike deserves the English saddle. Lasts decades.

stock_parts.comp_note: E-rated Schwalbe so takeoffs sell, but no confirmed solds found. Low estimate per tire.

upgrade.name: Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5x2.0
upgrade.note: Step up from Energizer to the flat-proof Marathon casing. Verified $63-74 street.

stock_parts.comp_note: Stock Ergons are already the upgrade, so they come off less. Worth a little more than generic grips used. No solds confirmed.
Crash-replacement demand from Gazelle owners, thin supply in the US. No solds found, estimated low.
Same thin used market as other Suntour commuter forks. No solds found, estimated low at $60.

bikes.blurb: Gazelle's entry Bosch commuter with a standard Shimano 9-speed drivetrain. Ships with the slow 2A compact charger, which makes the charger upgrade the most predictable sale on this bike.

stock_parts.comp_note: Shared Bosch part. New $60-171 on eBay, no 3+ confirmed used solds, estimated low at $60. Newer smart-system bikes carry the Purion 200 variant.

upgrade.name: Bosch Kiox 300
upgrade.note: Verified $124-172 street. Fits smart-system Medeos only; older BDU3xx bikes take the Kiox BUI330 instead.

stock_parts.comp_note: Shared Bosch part, same evidence as other PowerTube 500 entries: forum asks and listings only, no confirmed solds. Floor estimate, ground shipping only.

upgrade.name: Bosch PowerTube 625
upgrade.note: Same slot in most frames, 25 percent more range. Check frame year fitment.

stock_parts.comp_note: 2A compacts trade below the 4A standard. No confirmed solds isolated for the 2A, estimated low at $40 off the 4A's $50-135 sold band.

upgrade.name: Bosch standard 4A charger
upgrade.note: Halves the charge time on a 500Wh pack. First thing Medeo owners buy.

stock_parts.comp_note: Same shared part as the Ultimate C380 entry. No solds confirmed, estimated low.

upgrade.name: Brooks B17
upgrade.note: Buy once, ride it for twenty years.

stock_parts.comp_note: Same shared part as the Ultimate C380 entry. Low estimate per tire.

upgrade.name: Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5x2.0
upgrade.note: Flat-proof casing, verified $63-74 street. The commuter no-brainer.

stock_parts.comp_note: Shared part with the Ultimate C380 entry. Estimated low.
No real resale market for stock platforms.

upgrade.name: Shimano PD-EH500
upgrade.note: Flat one side, clipless the other. Sorted.

bikes.blurb: Giant's Yamaha-powered trekking commuter. Proprietary Giant electronics mean thinner takeoff demand than Bosch parts, but batteries and chargers still find captive replacement buyers.

stock_parts.comp_note: No sold listings found in searches. Thin Giant-only market, conservative $50 estimate on replacement demand alone.
New replacement runs about $760 per forum reports; no used solds found. Estimated low at $300 given smaller buyer pool than Bosch. Ground shipping only.
Proprietary plug, captive replacement demand. No solds found, estimated at $50 in line with the Bosch 4A sold band.
Generic OEM saddle, floor of the used market. No solds found.

upgrade.name: Brooks B17
upgrade.note: The saddle that turns a trekking bike into a touring bike.

stock_parts.comp_note: House-brand 700c tire, weak used demand. No solds found, floor estimate per tire.

upgrade.name: Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 700c
upgrade.note: Same flat-proof casing in 700c fitment. Check clearance against the stock 50mm width.

stock_parts.comp_note: Rack demand exists from crash repairs. No solds found, estimated low.
No meaningful resale market for stock platforms.

upgrade.name: Shimano PD-EH500
upgrade.note: The commuter pedal everyone lands on eventually.

bikes.blurb: Cannondale's step-thru Bosch commuter, the Verve+ 2's direct rival. Same Purion and 2A charger story: predictable takeoffs and a guaranteed charger upsell.

stock_parts.comp_note: Shared Bosch part, same evidence as other Purion entries. Estimated low at $60.

upgrade.name: Bosch Kiox BUI330 display
upgrade.note: Straight swap on the BDU2xx system. Color screen, real data.

stock_parts.comp_note: No direct used solds found; scaled below the PowerTube 500 floor estimate by capacity. Lithium, ground shipping only.
Shared part with the Medeo T9 entry. Estimated low at $40.

upgrade.name: Bosch standard 4A charger
upgrade.note: Cuts charge time in half. Every Neo owner wants one by month two.

stock_parts.comp_note: Stock foam saddle, floor of the used market. No solds found.

upgrade.name: Brooks B17
upgrade.note: The upgrade the whole forum tells them to buy.

stock_parts.comp_note: Budget OEM tire with the weakest resale on this list. Floor estimate per tire.

upgrade.name: Schwalbe Marathon E-Plus 27.5x2.0
upgrade.note: Verified $63-74 street. Biggest single reliability upgrade on this bike.

stock_parts.comp_note: Used grips are near worthless. Floor pricing.

upgrade.name: Ergon GP1 Evo grips
upgrade.note: Forty dollars to fix numb hands. Easy yes.

stock_parts.comp_note: No real resale market for stock platforms.

upgrade.name: Shimano PD-EH500
upgrade.note: Dual-sided and durable. Done.
